name: TREX CO INC
summary: Trex Co Inc is a manufacturer of wood-alternative decking, railing, and outdoor living products. The company produces composite decking and railing made from reclaimed wood and recycled plastic film, marketed under the Trex brand. Trex products are sold through a network of distributors and retailers for residential and commercial outdoor applications.

products.name: Trex Decking
products.description: Wood-alternative composite decking made from reclaimed wood and recycled plastic film

products.name: Trex Railing
products.description: Composite and aluminum railing systems for outdoor living spaces

products.name: Trex Outdoor Furniture
products.description: Outdoor furniture products for residential use
